digest.title: Talos: Scaling rare disease diagnosis with automated, iterative genomic reanalysis
digest.tldr: Talos was built to help resolve a major bottleneck in genomic medicine: human review time.  3 candidate variants per patient for expert review.

digest.title: Inside Microsoft’s two-decade push to cut water intensity while scaling for growth
digest.tldr: As demand for cloud and AI services continues to grow, datacenters are becoming more essential than ever.  Communities also want to better understand how this infrastructure affects local resources, particularly water.

digest.title: Reid Hoffman says SpaceX 'not an AI company', xAI 'complete train wreck'
Mark Zuckerberg wants Meta to launch its own prediction market
OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
digest.tldr: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
